author: Kazi Aidah Haque
description: Automatically colors and highlights texts across the vault.

manifest.author: Kazi Aidah Haque
manifest.description: Automatically Colors & Highlights Text across the Vault.
manifest.name: Always Color Text

name: Always Color Text

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed page jump to the top after checking a checkbox in Reading Mode (Thanks to @sharik14 in #36)
- Fixed default yellow markdown highlight changes to an incorrect color in Reading Mode (Thanks to @sharik14 in #46)
- Fixed Mobile UI issues: accidental deletions without confirmation, poor group menu layout (Thanks to @vxdewz in #47)
- Fixed "Starts With" match type and Unicode regex flag don't match full expected character range (Thanks to @cubbage in #48)
- Fixed clicking a heading in the Outline panel jumps to wrong position in Reading View (Thanks to @Miracle-ZT in #49)
- Fixed off-centered selects in plugin modals
- Improved Reading Mode scrolling performance
- Significantly Improved Mobile UI

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description: ### Bugfixes - Fixed loss of rendering on scroll in Live Preview - Fixed bullets being pushed outside of editor when 'Color Line' or 'Color Next Line' is used | Before | Fixed | |--------|-------| | | |

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Features
- **Automatic Backups**: Automatically back up plugin data to a folder inside your vault
  - Scheduled backups (hourly, daily, weekly)
  - One-click manual backup option
  - Overwrite previous backup option
  
- **Custom CSS Styling**: Advanced per-entry & group CSS customization
  - Allows for **font-size** & **gradient** adjustments too, both in Live Preview & Reading Mode
  (Thanks to @akhtsang in #43)
  ![](https://github.com/Kazi-Aidah/always-color-text/blob/main/assets/custom-css-bevel-font-size.png)
  
- **Color Targeting Modes**: Three new targeting options
  - Color Text (default): Colors only matched text
  - Color Line: Colors entire line containing matched text
  - Color Next Line: Colors the line under/after the matched text
  (Thanks to @sharik14 in #39)
  
- **New Limit Filters:** Use `ct`, `cl` & `cc` for filtering the new Color Targeting Modes.
  - `ct` → color text targeting entries
  - `cl` → color line targeting entries
  - `cn` → color next line targeting entries
  
- **Quick Styles Individual Application:** Allows separate quick styles to apply as either Always Color Text or Inline HTML. You can name them differently to discern between them.
- **New Command:** Color Selected Text for Current File (This adds an "Only Colors in" Inclusion rule for the current file, allowing the text to be colored only in the current file.)

## Fixed
- Missing Regex Name input field in Word Groups
- Jumps to top of note when checking checkboxes (#36)
- Chinese simplified language not working properly (#41)
- Coloring within links (#42)
- Regex Matching literally checking for modifiers before applying styling (#44)
- Default highlight color changes in Reading Mode (#46)
- Fixed Case Sensitivity issues

## Changes
- Preview in modals now show the Regex & Group names.
- Made "Remove Inline Color" work for lots of HTML spans as well. (Thanks to @Bamajon1974 in #37)
- Removed X buttons from Colored Texts, Blacklists and Word Groups (UI/UX issue, I kept accidentally deleting entries. At present, right-click to delete entry.)
- Changed the X buttons in Quick Colors to clickable-icons. (They look better now :D)
- Removed "Use swatch names for coloring text" setting. (Unmaintained. Let me know if you want it back with proper support.)
- Made the drag handle icons consistent for all draggable elements.
- Improved UI elements and updated descriptions styling.

***

Apologies for the lack of updates these past 3 months. I did not have proper access to WiFi or electricity, which made it quite impossible to push updates consistently. I almost gave up on Custom CSS, as it was not working as expected (I really wanted the font size adjustment) but I kept at it and somehow it started working! If you find any bugs, have any issues, or need new features, feel free to create an issue [here](https://github.com/Kazi-Aidah/always-color-text/issues/new)!

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Features
- Added Arabic and German languages.
- Added **bold**, *italic*, and ***bold italic*** presets.
- **Word Completion Color:** Renders text colors only after a space is entered, significantly improving typing performance.
- **Smart Updates:** Experimental performance setting that freezes all other lines and updates only the current line, which may improve typing speed.
- **Word Group Styling:** You can now assign a style to a word group; all entries in that group will use the assigned style. A “Text” label appears with the styling on Word Groups when group styling is used.
- **Light Mode & Dark Mode Text Color Fixer:** If entries were added in Light Mode and appear incorrect in Dark Mode (or vice versa), their colors are automatically adjusted for readability.
- Added a **Color / Highlight Once Text** right-click menu option.
- Added a **Remove Inline Color** right-click menu option when selecting Color / Highlight Once text. (Thanks @Bamajon1974 in #34)
- **New Commands:**
  - Color / Highlight Once Selected Text
  - Enable/Disable Lightweight Mode
- Added a **Regex Support Warning Modal:** When clicking the Preset button while Regex Support is disabled, a modal will appear informing users that Regex Presets will not work unless the setting is enabled. (Affects new users only.)

## Other Changes
- Renamed **Enable/Disable Document Coloring** to **Enable/Disable Global Coloring**.
- Updated the search icon to use the Lucide Search icon.
- Improved the layout of plugin settings and grouped related settings.
- Tables, Bases, Callouts, and Canvases now render in Lightweight Mode.
- Improved performance, especially in Lightweight Mode.

## Fixes
- Fixed an issue where colored text appeared over the [Inline Spoilers](https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers) plugin.
- The Match Type and Case Sensitivity dropdowns now appear again in the Edit Entry modal.
- Markdown highlights no longer disappear when the plugin is in use. (Thanks @Jeroom in #35)
- Highlight Once colors now apply correctly when clicking outside the modal. (Thanks @Bamajon1974 in #34)

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Features
- Added **Enable in** and **Disable in** options to Word Groups to control coloring for files in specific folders or with specific tags.
- Added **tag support** to File / Folder Coloring Rules and the Edit Entry modal for per entry Inclusion / Exclusion rules. (Thanks to @elvarb in #29)
- Added a **Heading H3 preset** and separate heading coloring support.
- Added a **Color in Live Preview** toggle to allow disabling Live Preview rendering.
- Added an experimental **Lightweight Mode** toggle. (Thanks to @Rudgas in #27)

## Changes
- Updated plugin settings UI to improve compatibility with the Obsidian 1.11.4 update.
- Added an icon to the plugin settings for Obsidian 1.11.4 and other visual enhancements.
- Renamed the 'Enable/Disable Always Color Text' and 'Enable/Disable coloring for current document' commands to show Enable or Disable based on their current state, matching the pattern introduced in the previous update. (All commands now follow this behaviour 👍)

## Fixes
- Fixed issue where one word was required to render regex. (Thanks to @akhtsang in #31)
- Fixed a missing icon for the Duplicate Entry option in the Color Style right click menu.
- Fixed heading and Markdown link regex rules not working inside Word Groups.
- Fixed multi-word colors not matching the selected match type correctly.
- Fixed inclusion and exclusion rules not persisting in the Edit Entry modal.
- Removed Coloring from [QuickAdd Plugin](https://github.com/chhoumann/quickadd)'s Settings (Thanks to @nanjingman in #33)

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## Bugfixes
- Fixed missing confirmation modal buttons
- Fixed entries in word groups using custom swatches not updating when Swatch Link Updates is enabled
- Fixed file exclusion not working

Thanks to @Maja-Nune for the above three fixes in #32.

- Fixed regex rules not triggering unless a second rule was partially matched. (Thanks to @akhtsang in #31)
- Fixed color name search not filtering entries in word groups
- Performance fix for lag while typing in files with many headers. (Thanks to @rudgas in #27)

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Features
- **Quick Colors**: Choose a text color and background color group that appears directly in the right click menu.
- **Quick Styles**: Apply a highlight style to selected text. When Quick Colors are enabled, the style uses the selected Quick Color. Otherwise, it uses its own colors.
![](https://github.com/Kazi-Aidah/always-color-text/blob/main/assets/quick-color-AND-quick-styles.png)
  
- Added **Blacklist Word Groups** & a right-click menu option to "Move to Blacklist Group".
- **New Commands:** To Activate and Deactivate Word Groups. (Thanks @Maja-Nune in #28)
- **Regex Preset**: Added the “Highlighted Text” preset. (Thanks @writtenfool in #26)
- **Border Sides Options**: Added **Top, Left and Right**, and **Bottom, Left and Right** options.
- Added a search bar to **Files with Coloring Disabled**.

## Improvements
- Added Drag Handles to make dragging smooth of Custom Colors, Quick Colors & Quick Actions.
- Renamed hide/unhide text color and highlight color commands.
  Commands now show **Hide** when visible and **Unhide** when hidden.
- Folded One time Actions, Highlight Appearance, and Custom Swatches sections.
- Improved storage saving to prevent duplicate entries.
- Edit Entry Modal visual improvements
- Better Performance (Thanks @rudgas in #27)

## Fixes
- Fixed an issue where changing the Word Group of an entry already in a Word Group caused duplicate entries.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Features
- Added search results coloring support (Thanks @writtenfool in #25)
- Added **Show "Always Color Text" in right-click menu** toggle & unified right-click menu options in Settings. (Thanks @Maja-Nune in #24)

## Fixes
- Fixed CSS affecting other setting-items. (Thanks @Maja-Nune in #24)

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Feature
- Added case sensitivity and match type options to the Word Group modal. 
This changes the behavior of all entries in a word group.

## Fixes
- Fixed single and double character rendering in Reading mode.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description: Hotfix: Removed three characters necessary to color limitation (Thanks @Nysiades in #22)

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description: Hotfix: Fixed an issue where typing after colored text in tables would reverse the input order.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Support
- **Tables:** Colors now render in Live Preview Tables.
- **Bases:** Colors now render on Bases (Thanks @thely in #23).
  - Currently, text in text inputs, tags, and list inputs is colored.
- **Canvas:** Colors now render in Canvas.

## New Features
- Added missing Word Group and Match Type dropdowns and an Edit icon to the Pick Color modal (Thanks @Frumkin13 in #21)
- Added Word Group and an "Open in Regex Tester" button to the Edit Entry Modal.
- Added a “Hide inactive groups in dropdowns” toggle in settings.
- Added a Show "Add to existing entry" in right-click menu toggle.

## Patches
- **Fix 1:** Selecting text that exists in a word group no longer fails to prefill the colors when opening the Pick Color modal.
- **Fix 2:** The text preview in the Pick Color modal now displays per-entry highlight styling.
- **Fix 3:** Right-clicking on the Color Pickers for Custom Swatches now opens the Pick Color modal to allow easier hex code pasting.
- **Fix 4:** Fixed highlights requiring 3 characters or spaces around them to render (Thanks @Nysiades in #22).
- **Fix 5:** Fixed the “does not color in” functionality.
- **Fix 6:** Fixed the “Reset Highlight Styling” button not resetting values.
- **Fix 7:** Opening extended text affected by an existing match (e.g., `should` colored from `sh`) in the Pick Color modal no longer creates a new entry unless the user actually changes the color, match type, or word group.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description: Hotfix: Manual coloring now wins over regex on equal overlaps.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description: Hotfix: Fixed Border Radius not updating in the preview of Edit Entry & Edit Highlight Styling Modals

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Features
- Added Word Groups to the Colored Texts section (Thanks @Frumkin13 in #21)

## Improvements
- Converted the Plugin Settings to a Tab layout (Thanks @Frumkim13 in #21)
- Revised color picker modals to display the actual entry text when opened via right-clicking on color pickers.
- Updated the Double Quotes preset to use the pattern `"\b[^"\r\n]*\b"`
- Added a 24-hour preset
- UI Improvements

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## Big New Features:
- **Match Types:** Added `contains`, `exact`, `starts with`, and `ends with` match types (thanks @nanjingman in #20).
- **Per-Entry Highlight Styling:** Right-clicking an entry now shows an "Edit Entry Details" option. This opens a modal where you can configure the match type, case sensitivity, file/folder exclusion rules, and edit the highlight styling for that specific entry.
- **Add to Existing Entry:** A new command and right-click menu option were added to append text to an existing highlight entry (thanks @nanjingman in #20).
- **Limit Input:** A filter input has been added next to the search bars to limit visible entries (thanks @nanjingman in #20).

    **Count & Display:**
    - `0` (zero) → show all entries
    - `N` (number) → show only the last N entries
    
    **Filter by Type:**
    - `r` → regex entries only
    - `w` → word entries only
    - `c` → colored text entries
    - `h` → highlighted entries
    - `b` → both, text + highlight entries
    
    **Filter by Match Type:**
    - `e` → exact match-type entries
    - `sw` → starts-with match-type entries
    - `ew` → ends-with match-type entries


## Fixes:
- Fixed sentence coloring not rendering in Reading Mode.
- Fixed the color/highlight/both hierarchy logic so that longer text matches are colored correctly.

## Removals:
- Removed the "Specific Include/Exclude Rules" setting and its related command. Existing data was migrated to the new per-entry system to prevent data loss.

A huge thank you to @nanjingman. This update solves many issues and would not have been possible without their valuable suggestions and feedback.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Features
- New single quote presets.
- Right click on the color picker to open the color picker modal.
- Search word or pattern entries by swatch name.
- New toggle called "Link swatch updates to text colors" that allows word and pattern colors to inherit updated swatch colors when enabled.
- Added vertical panel layout options to the color picker layout.
- Added Border Style settings: solid, dashed, dotted, double, groove, ridge, inset, and outset, and renamed the original "Border Style" setting to "Border Sides".
- Added a Highlight Vertical Padding setting.
- Integrated the vault name into the Data JSON export filename to make it easier to identify which vault the data belongs to.

### Fixes
- Fixed the Regex Tester loading with the wrong color style.
- Fixed Regex Tester color picker behavior. Choosing "color" now shows only the text color picker, and choosing "highlight" shows only the highlight color picker instead of both.

### Other Changes
- Renamed advanced rules to "specific include or exclude rules".

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Features
- Added "Hide/Unhide Text Colors" and "Hide/Unhide Highlights" commands.
    - Works inside callouts as well!!
- Added "Reset Text Color" and "Reset Highlight" to the right click menu of a word entry.

## Fixes
- Fixed text not coloring inside callouts in Live Preview mode (thanks @alisakhaw-netizen in #17).
- Fixed the Custom Swatches heading staying unfolded after being collapsed.
- Fixed the time am/pm preset not rendering in Live Preview unless colored words were present.
- Fixed missing translations. Commands & Presets now display the correct translations.
- Improved the Russian translation (thanks @Frumkin13 in #19).
- In the Regex Tester, the user-defined highlight opacity and border now appear correctly in the matches preview.

## Other Improvements
- Added release dates to the changelog + changelog now shows all releases.
- Added margins for visual improvements.
- The command palette now updates immediately when a language is selected.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
### Important Patch / Fix
-  Fixed **colors not rendering in document** on plugin install / reinstall. (Thanks @alisakhaw-netizen in #17)

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
### Patches
- Fixed the Regex Tester opening with the wrong color style.
- Fixed an issue where regex features did not work in a new vault unless normal word entries existed.
- Fixed an issue in the Regex Tester where typed content appeared under the zero matches row.
- Fixed a mismatch where patterns like `//.+` worked in the tester but did not apply coloring in documents.

### Minor Additions
- Added a preset for code blocks.
- Added a drag handle to reorder custom swatches.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
# 1.5.0 BIG UPDATE

## New Languages
- Russian (thanks @Frumkin13 for the translation!!)

## New Features
- **Advanced Rules:** Allows specific texts to be excluded from coloring in a single document or folder, or included only in that document or folder.
- **Paragraph Coloring:** Now supports always coloring sentences and paragraphs. Previously, sentences were not colored due to word boundaries.
- **New Regex Tester:** The Add Regex button now opens the new tester where patterns can be tested before adding.
- **New Presets:** Added Comments, Bullets, Numbered Lists, and Checkboxes presets (thanks @rudgas in #16) and Bracket presets.
- Added the ability to duplicate entries or open an entry in the Regex Tester via right click.

### Commands
- Added "Manage Colored Texts" for quick access to colored word settings.
- Added "Add Regex (Open in Regex Tester)" which opens the Regex Tester.
- Added "Add Blacklist Regex" which opens the Blacklist Regex Tester.

## Improvements
- Split the "+ Add word / pattern" button into two: 
  - "+ Add Words" and "+ Add Regex". 
  - (Behavior: The "+ Add Regex" button is hidden when Regex Support is disabled.)
- Updated the presets modal to use a three column layout.
- Mobile data export now saves to the downloads folder, with the vault as a fallback.
- Recently added entries now stay at the end regardless of sort mode and persist until the settings tab is closed.

## Other
- Removed the self test command from the code since it was unnecessary.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Languages
- Simplified Chinese (thanks to @wanghong322 in #14 for the translation!!)
### Patch
- Added missing i18n keys for custom swatches across all supported locales
- Translated preset names across all locales
### Other
- Added Date (YYYY-MMM-DD) Preset

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Features
- Added language support (Thanks @Frumkin13 for the suggestion)
   - Added French, Spanish, Bangla, Hindi & Italian Languages
- Added Import/Export Data Settings

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed longer-shorter text colors overlapping
- Fixed highlight-only texts having black text color in reading mode

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## Patch:
- Fixed Coloring stopped working in Live Preview (due to 1.2.1 update)

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
### Bug Fixes:
- Headings are now correctly ignored when using the All Headings blacklist preset.
- Fixed disabled "Use Regex" behaviour for Blacklisted patterns (previously, it was affecting even when the regex was turned off for a pattern).
- Edits to Word/Pattern entries no longer disappearing.
- Patterns with spaces or \s at the end no longer get trimmed or disappear.
- Editing an entry no longer adds a space after commas.

### Other
- Added an "All texts" preset to color all texts.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Features
- Added reliable heading coloring. Headings are now detected correctly in both Reading view and Live Preview, so patterns that target h1 to h6 finally work as expected.
- Added a new preset called "All Headings (H1-H6)". You can use it to color all headings or to blacklist them with one click.

## Improvements
- Heading detection has been improved in both views. Live Preview now scans markdown lines directly, and Reading view checks real heading elements, giving reliable results no matter how the text is formatted or where the viewport starts.
- Sort mode in word lists is now persistent and no longer resets.
- New word and pattern entries now appear at the end of your list instead of jumping to the top or middle when a sort mode was active.

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed coloring not applying when italics used underscores instead of asterisks.
- Fixed an issue where switching from text color to highlight color could result in a blank or black highlight. The highlight now uses your existing text color unless you set a background.

## Other
- The in plugin changelog now keeps all entries instead of only the latest one.

Big thanks to @Rudgas for the detailed report and suggestions in #13!

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
### Bug Fixes:
- Fixed Partial Match not working properly for text colors.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
### Bug Fixes
- Fixed issue where selected text highlight did not appear correctly in the color picker modal.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description: ## New Features - Added a "One-Time Actions" Setting - Brought back **Color Once** & **Highlight Once** (Thanks @Yu1e in #12) - Added **Styling** for Highlight Once in Settings - Added "Use Global Highlight Style for Highlight Once" toggle - Added "Style Highlight Once" toggle to customize the styling of inline highlighting to the max. - **Implemented individual Color Picker modals** for Color Once & Highlight Once - Highlight Once Color Picker Modal now **shows the selected text in Highlight Once Styling** ## Improvements - Added a Search Icon to the Searchbar (Thanks @Shalds44 in #11)

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## Breaking Changes
- **Removed "Text & Background Coloring" section** - all words now save under "Always Colored Texts"
- **Removed folder-specific coloring** - replaced with unified Include/Exclude patterns for files and folders
- **Removed color once and highlight once functionality** - focusing on core plugin features

## Color System Overhaul
- **New unified color picker**: Preview selected text and choose both text & highlight colors in one modal
- **Flexible layout options**: Choose left/right panel placement or hide unused color panels
- **Swatch naming system**: "Use swatch names for coloring text" with dropdown selectors for consistent coloring
- **Enhanced word entries**: Color/highlight/both dropdown for each word/pattern
- **Now supports text colors, highlight colors, and both** simultaneously

## New Features
- **Regex blacklisting**: Blacklist now supports regular expressions (thanks @Rudgas in #9!)
- **Advanced search**: Search bars for Always Colored Texts, Blacklist Words, and File & Folder rules
- **Expanded border styles**: 4 new options (Top & Right, Top & Left, Bottom & Right, Bottom & Left)
- **Global highlight appearance**: New section for highlight customization
- **Disable Regex Safety**: Option for advanced users

## Organization & UI Improvements
- **Complete settings reorganization** (Thanks @Rudgas in #9!!)
- **Enhanced sorting**: More sort modes for all word lists and rules
- **Safety improvements**: Warning modal when disabling toggles from command palette

*Special thanks to @Rudgas for the comprehensive feedback in #9 that helped shape these improvements!*

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## Improvements

* Removing a single word from a grouped entry (e.g., `color, colour, col`) now removes only that word instead of deleting the entire grouping input.
* Word grouping inputs now update immediately after a removal. No need to switch sort modes for the settings panel to refresh.
* The "Remove always color text" right-click option now appears even when:

  * The selected text has both text and background coloring.
  * The selected text matches a grouped word but differs in case.
* Updated the right-click icon for Text & Background Coloring from a palette to a paint bucket.
* Moved the "Text & Background Coloring" section to appear immediately after "Defined Colored Words" for clearer organization.
* Added "Delete all words/patterns" for Text & Background Coloring.

## Bug Fixes

* Fixed an issue where Text & Background Coloring did not show the removal option in the right-click menu when both text and background colors were applied.
* Fixed incorrect behavior where blacklisted words were still being added to Text & Background Coloring. These now correctly show a blacklist notification and are not added.
* Fixed missing context menu options for grouped words when case sensitivity differed.
* Fixed word grouping updates not appearing in the settings UI until the sort mode was changed.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## New Features

- **More Background Highlight Border Styles:** Choose from **7 different border styles**: Full, Top & Bottom, Left & Right, Top only, Bottom only, Left only, Right only.
- **Rounded Corners on Wrapped Text:** Highlights now have optional rounded corners even when text wraps to a new line.

## Bug Fixes
- **Text + Background Coloring Crash Fixed:** The plugin now sorts all matches before adding decorations, preventing the `"Ranges must be added sorted"` error.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description: ## New Features - **Background Highlight Borders:** Add fully customizable borders (color, opacity, thickness) to highlights. (#8 – thanks @elvarb for the feature request!) - **Background Highlight Border Style:** Choose between **Full Borders** or **Bottom-only Borders**. - **Instant Folder Color Updates:** Files now update their coloring immediately when moved between folders with different color styles. ## Settings & UI Improvements - **Partial Match** moved under the *Case Sensitive* toggle for better organization. - Added a new section: **Global Coloring Appearance**, located above the Color Style dropdown. - **Background Highlight Opacity** is now a slider for smoother adjustments. - **Color Once** can now be disabled in the right-click menu for more control. ---

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description: ## New Feature: Text AND Background Coloring This new feature allows you to assign both text and background colors to words or expressions. Words in the **"Text & Background Coloring"** list now always appear colored, overriding all other settings. ### Important Note To have a document with absolutely no coloring, you must disable coloring for that document entirely. This is because words or expressions with Text & Background coloring will appear even when Color Style is set to None (for both Global and Folder settings). ---

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## **0.1.11**
### What's New
-  **Group words together:** Add multiple words to one color by separating them with commas (e.g., `dog, dogs, puppy`).
-  **Sort your list:** New buttons to sort your words A-Z or by last added word.

### Bug Fixes
-  **Fixed full-word matching:** Words like "**ate**" no longer color text inside larger words like "c**ate**gory" when partial matching is off.

*(Suggested by @HeraBlack0 in #5, thank you!!)*

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/637f4996-14bf-4c6c-a0f9-bd1378705f54)

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
**Bug Fixes:** 
- Regex text coloring now works throughout entire documents, fixing the issue where it would stop working after a certain amount of text.
- Italicized text colors now display properly in reading mode.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
**Bug Fix:** Fixed partial word coloring in Live Preview mode. 
When partial matching is enabled, words containing a colored pattern (e.g., "ate") now correctly color the entire word in Live Preview, matching Reading mode behavior.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## Always Color Text 0.1.8 – International Language Support & Performance Update
This release focuses on **speed**, **stability**, and **true multilingual support**, bringing smoother coloring and stronger handling for international text while retaining all the improvements from 0.1.7.

### International Language Support

* Full non-Roman script support for **Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, Bangla**, and more.
* Optimized processing pipelines for **non-Latin characters**.
* Fixed **(#4)** issue where adding Chinese characters caused the vault to freeze.

### Performance Boosts
* **Super-fast processing** for common alphanumeric patterns
* Separation between **simple** and **complex** patterns for better speed
* **Lower memory usage** by removing heavy monitoring systems
* Fixed RAM spikes caused by coloring large sections in one go, now processed in **chunks**, similar to reading mode!
* Added **HTML entity decoding** for smoother rendering (`&`, `<`, `>`, etc.)

### Technical Improvements
* Configurable performance constants for handling large documents
* More efficient **DOM walker** with optimized TreeWalker patterns
* Clearer error handling using **development** and **production** mode flags
* Improved overlap resolution for more accurate coloring

### Bug Fixes
* Fixed checkmark rendering issues in reading mode
* Improved color consistency between editor and preview
* Prevented potential memory leaks through better DOM cleanup

**Testing note:** Mixed language documents and large, color-heavy files now perform much faster. 
If you work with multiple languages or noticed lag before, this update should feel *way* smoother!

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
# Always Color Text 0.1.7 – Stability Release
This update stabilizes the regex feature and large document coloring support introduced in 0.1.6 by resolving the memory and performance issues some users encountered.
### Immediate Fixes:
- **Eliminated RAM spikes and vault freezing** reported in 0.1.6.
- **Fixed memory leaks** in the DOM and regex processing.
- **Added performance safeguards** to prevent UI blocking during rapid edits.

### Optimized Performance:
- **Smarter processing** using efficient APIs (TreeWalker) and chunked rendering for large documents.
- **Reduced overhead** with cached operations and debounced refreshes.
### New Settings:
- Added toggles for disabling coloring in Reading mode and ***forcing a full color render***.
**Testing Note:** Forced full rendering has been tested successfully in a 200,000 character document without RAM spikes. Please file an issue if you encounter any problems.
### Quality of Life Improvements:
- Removed checkboxes for Folder Color Exclusion and added a "None" option in the Color Style dropdown and in the Global Color Style. (This will allow the whole vault to have no color and only selected folders to have colors.)
- Changed separate Enable/Disable Commands into singular commands in the palette.
- Fixed Blacklisting, improved Partial Words to prioritize **longer text segments over shorter colored texts**

If you upgraded to 0.1.6 and experienced freezing, this update will restore smooth performance while keeping all the new features. Your existing settings are automatically preserved!

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
## Major Update: Regex Power & Unlimited Documents

### New Features
- **Full Regex Support**: Color complex patterns like dates, URLs, and custom expressions (#2)
- **No More Size Limits**: Coloring works in documents of any length  
- **Ready-to-Use Examples**: Check README for practical regex patterns

### Fixes & Safety Improvements
- **Resolved coloring cutoff** in large files (#3)
- **Automatic complexity detection** prevents memory spikes by disabling overly complex patterns
- **Active document processing** ensures smooth performance in multi-file workspaces

### Important Notes
Complex regex patterns with many alternations (>5) or excessive length (>150 chars) will be automatically disabled with user notification for optimal performance.

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description: Added Folder Specific Color Style. Now it allows setting text color or background highlight on a per-folder basis.

+ Added Folder-Specific Coloring, allowing folders with no coloring
+ Added Frontmatter functionality: `always-color-text: false`

releases.author: Kazi-Aidah
releases.description:
Initial release of Always Color Text plugin.
- Color specific words in both editor and preview modes.
- Custom color swatches.
- Toggle case sensitivity and partial matching.
- File-specific disabling.
- Toggles for Disabling Global Colouring.
